title: Sword Art Online
description:
In the near future, thousands of players log into Sword Art Online, a revolutionary virtual reality MMORPG that allows users to fully immerse themselves inside the game world using advanced technology called NerveGear. However, excitement quickly turns into terror when the creator of the game traps every player inside and announces that death in the game will also mean death in real life. With no way to escape except by clearing all one hundred floors of the floating castle Aincrad, players are forced to fight for survival.

Among them is Kazuto Kirigaya, known in-game as Kirito, a skilled solo player who begins navigating the deadly world while meeting powerful allies such as Asuna Yuuki. As the journey continues across multiple virtual worlds and dangerous adventures, Kirito faces powerful enemies, emotional losses, and mysteries connected to the growing influence of virtual reality technology. Combining action, romance, fantasy, and science fiction, Sword Art Online tells an exciting story about survival, friendship, love, and the connection between reality and virtual worlds.
